title: Prenatal exposure to cigarette smoke induces diet- and sex-dependent dyslipidemia and weight gain in adult murine offspring.
summary: This study investigates the effects of prenatal cigarette smoke exposure on lipid metabolism and weight gain in adult mice, exploring how these effects are influenced by diet and sex.
key_findings: Prenatal exposure to cigarette smoke induces diet- and sex-dependent dyslipidemia and weight gain in adult murine offspring.
